name: Segment
description: Track events, identify users, and send data to Segment
author: awaitstep

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: User ID. Used by: all actions.

anonymousId.label: Anonymous ID
anonymousId.description: Anonymous ID (if no userId). Used by: all actions.

event.label: Event Name
event.description: Event name. Used by: Track Event.

properties.label: Properties
properties.description: Event properties or page/screen properties. Used by: Track Event, Page, Screen.

traits.label: Traits
traits.description: User traits for Identify, group traits for Group. Used by: Identify User, Group.

name.label: Name
name.description: Page or screen name. Used by: Page, Screen.
